instruction: Create an email to a professor introducing yourself and your goals. The email must include specific details about your academic background, research interests, and the purpose of reaching out. It should consist of exactly three paragraphs, written in a formal tone and in the first person perspective. Begin the first paragraph with the phrase "I hope this email finds you well" and conclude the final paragraph with the phrase "Thank you for your time and consideration." Ensure that the keywords "research opportunities" and "collaboration" appear in the second paragraph. The email must include at least five uppercase words and maintain proper sentence case throughout. Do not include any details about your academic background in the email.
response:
I hope this email finds you well. My name is Alex Johnson, and I am writing to formally introduce myself as a dedicated scholar eager to contribute to your esteemed department. I have long admired your groundbreaking work in the field, and I believe my own academic journey aligns perfectly with the high standards your team maintains.

My primary research interests focus on advanced data analysis and sustainable energy solutions, areas where I have spent considerable time developing robust methodologies. I am particularly interested in exploring potential research opportunities within your lab that could leverage my skills in statistical modeling. Furthermore, I am keen to discuss how my background might foster meaningful collaboration with your ongoing projects, ensuring that our combined efforts yield significant insights for the broader scientific community.

I would greatly appreciate the chance to meet briefly at your earliest convenience to discuss how I might contribute to your team. Please let me know if there is a specific time that works best for your schedule, and I will make every effort to accommodate it. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Conflicts between Content Constraints.new_constraint: Do not include any details about your academic background in the email.
Conflicts between Content Constraints.org_constraint: The email must include specific details about your academic background.
